_comment: Pre-identified token burn tasks. Run `python run.py --burn` to execute them in order.
_fill_prompt: See FILL_TASKS_PROMPT.md for the prompt to give Claude to populate this file.

tasks.name: Example: refactor a module
tasks.description: Refactor src/foo.py for readability and add type hints
tasks.prompt: Review and refactor src/foo.py -- improve readability, add type hints, and write docstrings for all public functions.
tasks._note: Set enabled: true and fill in real values to activate

tasks.name: Example: generate documentation
tasks.description: Write a comprehensive README for a project
tasks.prompt: Read the codebase and write a thorough README.md covering: what it does, how to install, how to use, configuration options, and examples. Save it to README.md.

tasks.name: Example: code review
tasks.description: Deep code review of a project
tasks.prompt: Do a thorough code review of this project. Identify: bugs, security issues, performance problems, missing error handling, and opportunities to simplify. Write a detailed report.

execution._order_note: sequential = top to bottom; could add 'random' or 'by_tag' later
execution._stop_note: Stop queueing more tasks once window usage exceeds this % of limit
